problems: Headline doesn't explain what makes Fairfax Roofing different.
The free estimate CTA is below the fold, reducing prompt engagement.
Phone number isn't visible on mobile, making immediate contact difficult.
money_impact: Lower conversion on first visit due to vague messaging.
Fewer immediate quote requests as CTA isn't prominent.
Lost leads from potential clients unable to contact easily.
